overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded protagonist walking through a historic Middle Eastern city along a canal. The character moves through stone colonnades, market areas with stalls, and past traditional mud-brick buildings with ornate wooden balconies and blue domed structures visible in the background.

events.description: character moves from open street into covered colonnade area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the canal-side path toward a stone archway, passing pedestrians in traditional robes

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in black robes walking opposite direction along the path

entered.detail: tan-colored traditional building with ornate wooden balcony and lattice windows
calm waterway running alongside the stone pathway
large building with distinctive blue dome visible in the distance
tall palm trees lining the opposite side of the canal
ornate carved stone archway marking entrance to the covered colonnade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit canal-side street with traditional mud-brick buildings on the right and a calm waterway on the left. The hooded protagonist walks forward toward an ornate stone archway, passing a pedestrian in dark robes. In the distance, a distinctive blue-domed building rises above the palm trees, establishing the historic Middle Eastern setting.

events.description: passing under the main stone archway into the covered walkway
entering market area with stalls and blue fabric canopies

agents.ego_description: walking through the shaded colonnade, passing NPCs and approaching market stalls along the waterfront

notable_agents.action: woman in dark robes standing near building entrance
group of pedestrians walking along the canal edge

entered.detail: series of carved stone arches forming a covered walkway overhead
wooden stall with goods displayed under a blue fabric canopy
small wooden boat moored along the canal edge

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a shaded colonnade with intricately carved stone arches overhead. The lighting shifts to dappled sunlight as the protagonist passes under the main archway. Market stalls with blue canopies appear on the right, while a small wooden boat is visible on the canal. The crowd density increases with several NPCs walking or standing along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: market area with stairs ascending to upper level

events.description: character begins ascending wide stone stairs to upper walkway
moving from open market area into upper covered colonnade

agents.ego_description: walking through the market area and climbing stone stairs to reach the upper walkway level

notable_agents.action: elderly person with walking cane standing near building wall

entered.detail: wide stone steps leading upward to the next level
blue fabric canopy shading market goods and creating dappled light
large ceramic pots with lush greenery flanking building entrance

segments.scene_description: The protagonist moves through a bustling market area with blue canopies overhead, creating a mix of sun and shadow. The character approaches and begins climbing a wide set of stone stairs. An elderly NPC with a cane stands near the wall on the right, while potted plants and market goods line the path. The canal water becomes occluded by the rising terrain.

events.description: entering final covered colonnade section with deeper shadows

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper colonnade, passing through alternating patches of sunlight and shadow

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white and black robes walking toward the camera

entered.detail: elevated covered walkway with repeating stone arches and columns
empty wooden cart with large spoked wheels parked near the canal edge
canal visible again from the upper vantage point

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the upper level and walks along another covered colonnade, with the canal now visible from a higher vantage point on the left. A wooden cart sits empty near the water's edge. The architecture features repeating stone arches that create rhythmic patterns of light and shadow. A pedestrian in contrasting robes approaches from the distance as the path continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit canal-side street into a bustling market and up toward an elevated architectural walkway. It begins with the hooded protagonist walking past mud-brick buildings toward an ornate stone archway, with a distant blue-domed building rising above palm trees. As the character passes under the arch, the scene shifts into a shaded colonnade of carved stone where dappled sunlight falls over blue-canopied market stalls and a small boat on the waterway. The path then leads through the crowded market area and up a wide set of stone stairs, causing the canal to disappear behind the rising terrain. Finally, the camera reaches an upper level, moving along another rhythmic sequence of stone arches that reveal the canal from a higher vantage point.
